title: corybas incurvus
intro: Corybas incurvus, also known as the helmet orchid or helmet orchid corybas, is a species of terrestrial orchid native to Australia. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits associated with Corybas incurvus include its potential to reduce swelling, treat wounds, and alleviate respiratory issues. The herbal preparations of Corybas incurvus typically involve making a tea or infusion from the plant's roots and leaves, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
